note: The public 2025-2026 official Handbook publishes 198 units of Major Courses: 24 coded Biomedical Sciences courses totalling 52 units, 31 coded Chinese Medicine courses totalling 97 units, and three coded Clinical Internship in Chinese Medicine courses totalling 49 units. It separately requires both 3-unit Biomedical Sciences Honours Project courses for 6 units. The Programme states that CMED4015, CMED4018 and CMED4019 are excluded from the BSc (Hons) in Biomedical Science honours-classification GPA calculation. Students must also complete 9 units of Free Electives; the Programme displays 11 recommended coded courses, including two offered by CUHK and three offered by HKU. Those 11 explicit recommendations are recorded, but the official wording is an open recommendation list and is not presented as a closed elective pool. The five external-university codes use the titles and units explicitly published by the HKBU Programme page; the remaining 66 HKBU codes are cross-checked against their individual 2025-2026 Handbook course pages. Individual course pages supply their current canonical bilingual titles where these differ from the Programme table. The 2026-2027 Handbook route currently returns HTTP 401, so no 2026-2027 course or rule is inferred. University Language and General Education course lists are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the public requirement table does not publish course timing.
